---
title: "Installation & Setup"
---

### System Requirements

-   **Platform:** Web-based UI (Chrome, Safari, Edge)
-   **Infrastructure:** No Discord or external messaging apps required.

### Downloads

[**Download Windows Installer (v1.0)**](https://github.com/westland/mktbook/releases)\
[**Download macOS Installer (v1.0)**](https://github.com/westland/mktbook/releases)

### Instructor Access

To request a Global Admin key to view leaderboards and manage your classroom marketplace, please contact [J. Christopher Westland](mailto:westland@uic.edu).
